历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 1071 → 712 → 2306 → 792 → 689, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, due to the refinement of major divisions (addition of low-score majors such as Biological Sciences and Basic Medicine), the ranking dropped sharply to 2306, recovered to 792 in 2024, and further advanced to 689 in 2025, with a continuous upward trend in the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 689. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 50 in 2021, 48 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 58 in 2024, and 49 in 2025. In 2026, the physics category plan significantly increased to 81, an expansion of about 65.3% compared to 2025, greatly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 8th from 2021 to 2024 and 9th from 2025 to 2026, consistently in the national Top 10 with top-tier comprehensive strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is relatively positive, with the Journalism and Communication discipline ranking steadily among the top nationwide and good enrollment transparency. It ranks first in the national university cafeteria rankings, with about 35 cafeterias, and living conditions are well-received. On Douyin, it is relatively hot (ranked 22nd overall), with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting increased attention for applications. No record of enrollment gaps or significant negative public opinion. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 17 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanical Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Physics A, Management Science and Engineering A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A, Clinical Medicine A-, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A-, Chemistry A-, Basic Medicine A-, Business Administration A-, Journalism and Communication A-, Biomedical Engineering A-, Biology A-. Among them, Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine are all currently high-demand majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended majors, while Clinical Medicine is a recommended major, highly consistent with HUST's advantageous disciplines, attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2025, the provincial physics category had about 121,000 candidates, and in 2026, it is estimated to be about 146,000 (total candidates 218,700, estimated based on recent physics category proportion of about 66.6%), with a candidate scale growth of about 20%, intensifying competition. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, not within Gansu Province, and its enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 0.9%–1.2% (about 0.9% in 2024, about 1.2% in 2025), which is a normal proportion for cross-provincial enrollment. Wuhan, as an educational center in central China, has a certain appeal to Gansu candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 689, the significant expansion of the 2026 physics category plan by about 65.3% (from 49 to 81), the provincial physics category candidate growth of about 20%, the relatively positive university reputation, the hot Douyin trend, and the high overlap between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, the expansion rate far exceeds the candidate growth rate, significantly easing overall competition pressure. The ranking number should shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 974, with a range of 877–1071.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 877–1071, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 877), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 1071), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 2 majors and ensure Tier 3 as a safety net. It is recommended to make careful choices based on personal career plans.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology conducts separate enrollment for medical programs in Gansu Province. In 2021, the lowest ranking was 754 (planned enrollment of 5), in 2022 it was 712 (planned enrollment of 5), and in 2023, due to a significant expansion to 16 students, the ranking dropped sharply to 4005. In 2024, enrollment continued to expand to 25 students, and the ranking rebounded to 2782. In 2025, enrollment was reduced to 14 students, and the ranking further rose to 2654. In 2026, the plan continues to decrease to 11 students (a reduction of approximately 21.4%), with majors adjusted to Clinical Medicine (3 students), Pediatrics (3 students), Medical Imaging (3 students), and Medical Laboratory Technology (2 students), canceling the Preventive Medicine Qiming Experimental Class (1 student) from 2025. Under the trend of enrollment reduction, competition intensifies, and the ranking is expected to continue rising.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and one of the first batch of Double First-Class construction universities. Its Tongji Medical College is one of the top medical schools in China, with Clinical Medicine as a national Double First-Class construction discipline. Its affiliated Union Hospital and Tongji Hospital rank among the top in the country in comprehensive strength, exerting a strong attraction for Gansu candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been rising nationwide. As a top medical school in China, Huazhong University of Science and Technology's Tongji Medical College's majors such as Clinical Medicine, Medical Imaging, and Pediatrics are highly recognized among Gansu candidates. In 2026, only 11 students will be enrolled in medical programs, with a small enrollment scale and prominent supply-demand contradiction, so the ranking is expected to move forward further. The university is located in Wuhan, with a superior geographical location and convenient transportation, which strongly attracts candidates from the northwest.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, the lowest admission ranking for Huazhong University of Science and Technology's medical programs in Gansu Province in 2026 is expected to be around 2263, an increase of approximately 391 places compared to 2654 in 2025 (a smaller ranking number indicates increased admission difficulty). The fluctuation range is expected to be between 2082 and 2444. It is recommended that candidates plan their volunteer applications reasonably within this range.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 Clinical Medicine as a reach, and Tier 3 Medical Laboratory Technology as a safety option.
